title: Xtra Velvety Ethiopian Tofu Atakilt Wat
description: A kid-friendly Ethiopian dish featuring soya milk and tofu, with a citrusy and velvety texture, shaped like nigiri for a fun twist.

ingredients.name: extra firm tofu
ingredients.notes: drained and cut into small cubes

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is translucent.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger and cook for 1 minute.
Add the cubed tofu and cook until it is lightly browned.
In a small bowl, whisk together the soya milk, lemon juice, berbere spice, and salt.
Pour the milk mixture over the tofu and onions, and stir to combine.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Use a spoon to shape the tofu mixture into small nigiri shapes.
Serve the atakilt wat hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
